title: Manage the lifecycle of your projects on GitHub
summary: Through work planning and tracking, effective branching strategies, and extending GitHub through its API, manage releases all the way from idea to working software in the hands of your users.

sections.title: Manage the lifecycle of your projects on GitHub
sections.summary: Through work planning and tracking, effective branching strategies, and extending GitHub through its API, manage releases all the way from idea to working software in the hands of your users.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use key GitHub features, including issues, notifications, branches, commits, and pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage software delivery by using a release based workflow on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to implement a release based workflow on GitHub using project boards, branches, and releases.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/release-based-workflow-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage software delivery by using a release based workflow on GitHub

lessons.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage changes to your repository source by using pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-changes-pull-requests-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub

lessons.title: Settle competing commits by using merge conflict resolution on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to settle overlapping commits across branches by using merge conflict resolution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/resolve-merge-conflicts-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Settle competing commits by using merge conflict resolution on GitHub

lessons.title: Automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps
lessons.content_md:
Learn to automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps that handle repetitive tasks, enforce team policies, and maintain a tidy repository.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automate-devops-github-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps

lessons.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to search and organize repository history by using filters, blame, and cross-linking on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/search-organize-repository-history-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Manage the lifecycle of your projects on GitHub
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Manage the lifecycle of your projects on GitHub**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
